ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-08-2021 Continued To Nov-15-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-05-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated April 01, 2019, is admitted to probate. Alma Arcelia Campos is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee. Status on close of estate is set for May 10, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-07-2021 Continued To May-05-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
